requiredCheckNames: JRN-043 SDLC Governance CI Release result
requiredRemediation: Add at least one distinct collaborator or organization team that can provide independent governed approvals.
Configure and verify branch protection or a repository ruleset for sambassam.
Configure every requiredCheckNames entry as a required status check.
Enable stale-approval dismissal, code-owner review, conversation resolution, and last-push approval by a different actor.
Map governance, CI, quality, security, release, risk, and independent implementation review to real identities or teams without self-approval.
Obtain completed successful GitHub Actions results for the same immutable sambassam commit used by the closure claim.
